title: Drone strike
title_en: Drone strike
description: Russian Federation began to expand Alabuga - the main factory for the production of "Shakhedov" on a large scale. OSINT analysts showed new satellite images: the construction of new production workshops on another 340 hectares began on the territory of the SEZ "Alabuga" in Tatarstan. Active installation of the main structures is already underway there. It is in "Alabuga" that the main part of Russian strike drones of the "Gerany" type are produced...
description_en: Russian Federation began to expand Alabuga - the main factory for the production of "Shakhedov" on a large scale. OSINT analysts showed new satellite images: the construction of new production workshops on another 340 hectares began on the territory of the SEZ "Alabuga" in Tatarstan. Active installation of the main structures is already underway there. It is in "Alabuga" that the main part of Russian strike drones of the "Gerany" type are produced...
description_uk: рф начала масштабно расширять "Алабугу" - главный завод по производству "Шахедов" OSINT-аналитики показали свежие спутниковые снимки: на территории ОЭЗ "Алабуга" в Татарстане началось строительство новых производственных цехов еще на 340 гектаров. Сейчас там уже идет активный монтаж основных конструкций. Именно в "Алабуге" выпускают основную часть российских ударных беспилотников типа "Герань"...

Andrii Sybiga emphasized that the recovery of Ukraine opens up significant opportunities for mutually beneficial cooperation with Japanese business, primarily in the energy sector. The minister invited...

Андрій Сибіга наголосив, що відновлення України відкриває значні можливості для взаємовигідної співпраці з японським бізнесом, насамперед в енергетичній сфері. Міністр запросив...

description_uk: россия 18 месяцев следила за ядерными объектами Европы с помощью дронов, — The Guardian Аналитики IISS насчитали 144 подозрительных инцидента более чем в десяти странах Европы. Среди целей были британская авиабаза RAF Lakenheath, французская база атомных подлодок Île Longue, а также объекты в Бельгии и Нидерландах, где хранится американское ядерное оружие. title: Kyiv: 86 injured
title_en: Kyiv: 86 injured
description: Update: Death toll rises to 18, with 86 injured in massive Kyiv attack. At least 18 people were killed and 86 injured after a massive Russian missile and drone attack hit Kyiv overnight on July 2, local authorities reported. Search and rescue operations are ongoing at several sites, including a partially collapsed high-rise residential building in the Darnitskyi District.
description_en: Update: Death toll rises to 18, with 86 injured in massive Kyiv attack. At least 18 people were killed and 86 injured after a massive Russian missile and drone attack hit Kyiv overnight on July 2, local authorities reported. Search and rescue operations are ongoing at several sites, including a partially collapsed high-rise residential building in the Darnitskyi District.
description_uk: Update: Death toll rises to 18, with 86 injured in massive Kyiv attack. At least 18 people were killed and 86 injured after a massive Russian missile and drone attack hit Kyiv overnight on July 2, local authorities reported. Search and rescue operations are ongoing at several sites, including a partially collapsed high-rise residential building in the Darnitskyi District.

title_en: Kharkiv: Attack attack on residential area
description: Liquidation of the consequences of the Russian attack continues in Kyiv: rescuers are sorting through rubble, looking for people, and providing assistance. Damage was recorded in more than 20 locations in the city, and mostly these are ordinary residential buildings. An ambulance station, a scientific institute, a hotel, and businesses were also destroyed. As of now, it is known that 13 people, unfortunately, died as a result of this Russian strike. My...

description_uk: У Києві триває ліквідація наслідків російської атаки: рятувальники розбирають завали, шукають людей, надають допомогу. У місті зафіксовані пошкодження на понад 20 локаціях, і переважно це звичайні житлові будинки. Також руйнувань зазнали станція швидкої допомоги, науковий інститут, готель, підприємства. Станом на зараз відомо, що 13 людей, на жаль, загинули від цього російського удару. Мої...

title: 74 missiles + 496 drones launched
title_en: 74 missiles + 496 drones launched
description: The most massive attack in recent times: at night, Russia launched 74 missiles and 496 drones over Ukraine, the Air Defense Forces managed to destroy 48 missiles and 476 UAVs. The hits of 25 ballistic missiles and 12 drones at 33 locations, as well as the fall of debris at 18 objects, were recorded.
description_en: The most massive attack in recent times: at night, Russia launched 74 missiles and 496 drones over Ukraine, the Air Defense Forces managed to destroy 48 missiles and 476 UAVs. The hits of 25 ballistic missiles and 12 drones at 33 locations, as well as the fall of debris at 18 objects, were recorded.
description_uk: Самая массированная атака за последнее время: ночью россия запустила по Украине 74 ракеты и 496 дронов, — ПС ПВО удалось обезвредить 48 ракет и 476 БпЛА. Зафиксированы попадания 25 баллистических ракет и 12 дронов на 33 локациях, а также падение обломков на 18 объектах.
